name: Ultimate Roast Beef Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise and horseradish sauce in a bowl.
2. Place slices of roast beef, lettuce, tomato, and onion on separate pieces of bread or rolls.
3. Spread the mayonnaise mixture evenly over one side of each roll.
4. Arrange the roast beef, lettuce, tomato, and onion on top of the mayonnaise spread.
5. Cover with the remaining slice of bread to complete the sandwich.
